name: Planning
description: Turn a problem into an execution plan through framing, challenge, and synthesis.

phases.name: Frame
phases.prompt: State the goal, constraints, context, and success criteria.

phases.name: Challenge
phases.prompt: Test the plan. Find gaps, raise risks, question assumptions. Provide your own independent analysis.

phases.name: Plan
phases.prompt: Write the final plan: ordered actions, decisions made, risks acknowledged, and open questions.
